news.t: TimesSquare Capital Management Announces the Launch of the TimesSquare Quality Mid Cap Growth ETF (TSCM)
Tidal Financial Group Announces the Launch of the TimesSquare Quality Mid Cap Growth ETF (TSCM)

holdings.infoBox: TSCM is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are MKS Inc. stock at 3.84%, argenx SE at 3.66%, Interactive Brokers Group at 3.60%, Performance Food Group Company at 3.58%, and Dynatrace at 3.50%.

overview.description: The TimesSquare Quality Mid Cap Growth ETF (TSCM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of 30-40 midcap stocks, selected by fundamental research for US businesses with sustainable competitive advantages, stable fundamentals, and attractive valuations. TSCM was launched on Dec 29, 2025 and is issued by TimesSquare.

data.title: TimesSquare Capital Management Announces the Launch of the TimesSquare Quality Mid Cap Growth ETF (TSCM)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ActiveManagement--TimesSquare Capital Management Announces the Launch of the TimesSquare Quality Mid Cap Growth ETF (TSCM): $25 million milestone hit.

data.title: Tidal Financial Group Announces the Launch of the TimesSquare Quality Mid Cap Growth ETF (TSCM)
